title: Greek Spanakopita Stuffed Beans
description: A refreshing twist on traditional spanakopita, using tender beans as the base and a crumbly greek filling.

ingredients.name: beans
ingredients.notes: any type will work, but cannellini or great northern are best

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the beans, crumbled spanakopita, melted butter, chopped dill, crumbled feta, minced garlic, salt, and black pepper. Mix until well combined.
Spoon the bean mixture into a baking dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the beans are tender.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 5-10 minutes or until the top is lightly browned.
Serve hot, garnished with additional dill if desired.
